title: Component library: implement bits-ui parity (planned contracts → required, cross-framework)
description: Grow the implemented component set from {Button,Badge,Toggle} toward the full bits-ui surface. All ~41 contracts already exist in @design-system/contracts (status 'planned'); the work per component is: implement in each design cell (react-v18 + svelte-v5), add tests + stories, promote planned->required in component-status.ts + RequiredComponentContracts, pass pnpm qa. Roadmap is 4 waves (see docs + child tasks). Canonical target is component-status.ts, NOT the stale shadcn-based future-components-reference.md.

title: Wave 1 — core forms & primitives
description: Label, Separator, Aspect Ratio (simple); Checkbox, Switch (stateful); Radio Group, Toggle Group, Select (composite); Progress, Meter (value-driven). Highest leverage, mostly self-contained; Select gates many forms. Individual component tickets are children of this task.

title: Component: Label (react-v18 + svelte-v5, promote to required)
description: Simple a11y glue; unblocks all form fields. Implement in designs/default/{react-v18,svelte-v5}, add unit + Storybook interaction tests, set componentContractStatus -> required, add to RequiredComponentContracts, pass pnpm qa. Contract already exists in packages/contracts/src/components/.

title: Component: Separator (react-v18 + svelte-v5, promote to required)
description: Trivial presentational; quick parity win. Implement in designs/default/{react-v18,svelte-v5}, add unit + Storybook interaction tests, set componentContractStatus -> required, add to RequiredComponentContracts, pass pnpm qa. Contract already exists in packages/contracts/src/components/.

title: Component: Aspect Ratio (react-v18 + svelte-v5, promote to required)
description: Simple layout wrapper. Implement in designs/default/{react-v18,svelte-v5}, add unit + Storybook interaction tests, set componentContractStatus -> required, add to RequiredComponentContracts, pass pnpm qa. Contract already exists in packages/contracts/src/components/.

title: Component: Checkbox (react-v18 + svelte-v5, promote to required)
description: Stateful: checked + indeterminate. Implement in designs/default/{react-v18,svelte-v5}, add unit + Storybook interaction tests, set componentContractStatus -> required, add to RequiredComponentContracts, pass pnpm qa. Contract already exists in packages/contracts/src/components/.

title: Component: Switch (react-v18 + svelte-v5, promote to required)
description: Stateful; sibling of existing Toggle. Implement in designs/default/{react-v18,svelte-v5}, add unit + Storybook interaction tests, set componentContractStatus -> required, add to RequiredComponentContracts, pass pnpm qa. Contract already exists in packages/contracts/src/components/.

title: Component: Radio Group (react-v18 + svelte-v5, promote to required)
description: Composite: roving-focus group. Implement in designs/default/{react-v18,svelte-v5}, add unit + Storybook interaction tests, set componentContractStatus -> required, add to RequiredComponentContracts, pass pnpm qa. Contract already exists in packages/contracts/src/components/.

title: Component: Toggle Group (react-v18 + svelte-v5, promote to required)
description: Composite: single/multi selection; builds on Toggle. Implement in designs/default/{react-v18,svelte-v5}, add unit + Storybook interaction tests, set componentContractStatus -> required, add to RequiredComponentContracts, pass pnpm qa. Contract already exists in packages/contracts/src/components/.

title: Component: Select (react-v18 + svelte-v5, promote to required)
description: Composite: listbox + popover + keyboard nav; gates many forms. Implement in designs/default/{react-v18,svelte-v5}, add unit + Storybook interaction tests, set componentContractStatus -> required, add to RequiredComponentContracts, pass pnpm qa. Contract already exists in packages/contracts/src/components/.

title: Component: Progress + Meter (react-v18 + svelte-v5, promote to required)
description: Simple value-driven display pair. Implement in designs/default/{react-v18,svelte-v5}, add unit + Storybook interaction tests, set componentContractStatus -> required, add to RequiredComponentContracts, pass pnpm qa. Contract already exists in packages/contracts/src/components/.

title: Wave 2 — overlays (Dialog, Popover, Tooltip, Dropdown, Alert Dialog)
description: Build a shared floating/dismiss/portal/focus-trap primitive FIRST (Popover, Tooltip, Dropdown all depend on it). Promote React-only Modal.tsx into a real cross-framework Dialog contract. Then Alert Dialog (Dialog variant). Composite components.

title: Shared floating/dismiss/portal + focus-trap primitive (overlay foundation)
description: Prerequisite for Popover, Tooltip, Dropdown Menu, Alert Dialog, Date Pickers, Link Preview. Provide anchored positioning, outside-click/escape dismiss, portal, and focus trap, framework-neutral where possible. Build before any Wave 2 overlay.

title: Wave 3 — navigation & structure (Tabs, Accordion, Collapsible, Toolbar, Pagination, Menubar, Navigation Menu, Context Menu, Scroll Area)
description: Collapsible before/with Accordion. Context Menu = Dropdown on right-click; Menubar/Navigation Menu need Wave 2 dropdown infra. Roving-focus patterns throughout.

title: Wave 4 — advanced (date/time family, Command, Slider, Combobox, Pin Input, Rating, Avatar, Link Preview)
description: Date & Time is a sub-tree: Calendar -> Range Calendar; Date/Time Field -> Range fields; then Date Picker/Date Range Picker compose Field + Calendar + Popover (do last, needs Wave 2 Popover). Command = palette (filter+list+keyboard). Avatar could move earlier.

title: Rename repo identity to framework-neutral design system name
description: Rename root package/docs language away from React-specific framing. Update package.json name, README title/description, and related docs to use a framework-neutral identity such as modular-ui-system or interface-system.

title: Rewrite or demote docs/future-components-reference.md (shadcn) to match bits-ui target
description: future-components-reference.md is shadcn-based and off-target: wrong catalog (Table/Toast/Sheet/etc. that bits-ui lacks), naming mismatches (Input OTP=PIN Input, Hover Card=Link Preview, Modal=Dialog), omits bits-ui date/time granularity + Meter/Rating/Range Calendar. Either rewrite against bits-ui (canonical = component-status.ts) or demote to 'shadcn comparison/inspiration only' so it isn't mistaken for the roadmap.

title: Co-locate React component implementation, styles, stories, and tests
description: Migrate react-v18 components from flat src/components plus src/design-system/components CSS into per-component directories with Button.tsx, button.css, stories, tests, and index.ts. Keep a single aggregated public stylesheet and preserve cascade layer order.

title: CI gate: every required contract has a story + interaction test in every cell
description: Make component testing-through-CI airtight. Extend design-system:verify (or a node --test) to assert: for each required contract, every design cell ships a Storybook story AND an interaction test. Today qa runs storybook:test for default-react-v18 only. Complements rcl-tws.12 (matrix-aware storybook in qa) and rcl-q64.3 (interactive knobs). The gate should fail if a required component lacks coverage in any cell.

title: Rename repo to cross-framework-ui-design-system
description:
Rename the repo from 'react-component-library' to 'cross-framework-ui-design-system' — the 'react' name is misleading now that the project is a cross-framework design system (React 18 + Svelte 5) built on design tokens and contract-based component libraries.

New repo: https://github.com/NeuralEmpowerment/cross-framework-ui-design-system

Scope:
- Rename the GitHub repo (Settings > rename) — GitHub auto-redirects the old URL.
- Update git remote: git remote set-url origin https://github.com/NeuralEmpowerment/cross-framework-ui-design-system.git
- Update references to the old name/path: README, CLAUDE.md/AGENTS.md, package.json (root name, repository.url), docs, any CI/badges.
- Update local clone directory name (optional): react-component-library -> cross-framework-ui-design-system.
- Note: npm package scope (@design-system/*) is unaffected; this is only the repo identity.

Considered alternatives: 'design-system' (matches @design-system scope but doesn't signal cross-framework); 'cross-framework-design-system' (no 'ui').

title: TEMP probe issue
Generator emits contract-based components
description: Update component-generator templates so generated React components import/extend @design-system/contracts prop interfaces, emit co-located component directories, and create adapter/export updates that satisfy the contract coverage model.

comments.author: claude
comments.text: Codex review #4/#5: generator still emits React-only, non-contract components targeting designs/default/react-v18 with local prop unions; 'form' componentType wrongly renders <form> via FormHTMLAttributes. Migration should require a target design/framework cell, import/extend contracts, update the right adapter/exports, separate componentType from htmlElement.

title: Remove axios: migrate react-v18 Storybook tests to @storybook/addon-vitest
description: Replace @storybook/test-runner + start-server-and-test (both pull wait-on -> axios) with @storybook/addon-vitest browser-mode tests. Eliminates all axios from the tree (vulnerable 0.27.2 + safe 1.17.0). Stack ready: SB10.4.4, vitest4.1.8, playwright1.55.1. Was previously deferred as unstable under pnpm.
close_reason: Migrated react-v18 to @storybook/addon-vitest (unified vitest.config.ts projects + --project flag). All axios/joi/uuid removed from tree; pnpm qa green (27 unit + 30 story tests). Dropped dead osv-scanner overrides.

title: Author Svelte 5 skill (.claude/skills/svelte-5) from official docs
description: Agent-facing skill distilled from github.com/sveltejs/svelte documentation/docs, focused on runes/state management (Svelte 4->5 pitfalls), template syntax, snippets, and this repo's Svelte patterns (contract adapter, browser-condition gotcha). SKILL.md + references/ + examples/. So agents build correct Svelte 5 UI.
close_reason: Authored .claude/skills/svelte-5/ (SKILL.md + 4 references + 4 examples) distilled from official Svelte docs; runes/state-management reviewed for Svelte 5 correctness + repo gotchas.

title: Cross-framework component swap + Tauri integration demo
description: End-goal: a Tauri app (Rust backend) imports components through a single type-safe adapter that re-exports the component contract. Swapping the component library (React <-> Svelte) is a one-import change; a non-conforming library fails type-check. Design is decoupled from the app: themes (light/dark + arbitrary), easy color/component swap, rem-based sizing.

title: Type-safe contract adapter module
description: Per-implementation adapter entrypoints only. Each concrete library exports its own contract-checked adapter, e.g. reactV18ContractAdapter. Application code can swap implementations by changing a single import line from one implementation package to another; no separate higher-level app-facing adapter package is required.
close_reason: Implemented per-implementation contract adapter pattern for React v18 and recorded architecture decision: no separate higher-level app-facing adapter package; swapping is a one-line import change between implementation packages.

title: Build @design-system/dashboard TUI (launchers + contracts swap scaffold)
description: Terminal entry point per docs/superpowers/specs/2026-06-16-tui-dashboard-design.md and plan docs/superpowers/plans/2026-06-16-tui-dashboard.md. Context-aware menu; generates the app-owned contract swap module against reactV18ContractAdapter. Svelte swap lights up when rcl-q64.2 lands (graceful degradation, no hard block).
close_reason: Built @design-system/dashboard: context-aware TUI (storybook launchers, run-task, install-contracts swap-module scaffold, design-tokens explainer). 21 unit tests + full pnpm qa green; final review READY_TO_MERGE. Branch feat/tui-dashboard.

title: Restructure to design-first matrix (designs/<design>/<framework>)
description: Move packages/component-libraries/{react-v18,svelte-v5} -> designs/default/{react-v18,svelte-v5}; rename packages to @design-system/default-{react-v18,svelte-v5} (keep export names reactV18ContractAdapter/svelteV5ContractAdapter so a design swap = change the package specifier). Establishes design x framework matrix per ADR-0002. Prerequisite for rcl-q64.5 (within-lane design swap demo).
close_reason: Migrated to design-first matrix: designs/default/{react-v18,svelte-v5}, packages renamed @design-system/default-* (export names preserved so a design swap = change the package specifier). All refs updated; full pnpm qa green, harness typecheck/build + cargo check pass, dist/index.d.ts intact. ADR-0004 records the decision.

title: Svelte Tauri harness + 2nd Svelte design (in-Svelte swap)
description: User's actual stack is Svelte (DreamShip/SvelteKit). Build/convert a Tauri harness with a Svelte frontend consuming default-svelte-v5 via svelteV5ContractAdapter + ./styles.css; add a 2nd Svelte design (brutalist-svelte-v5) and wire the in-Svelte design swap (mirror of the React demo). brutalist-react-v18 stays as a valid React-lane design.
close_reason: Built brutalist-svelte-v5 (2nd Svelte design, token-clean, 34 tests) + apps/tauri-harness-svelte (Svelte 5 Tauri app consuming svelte designs, swap via VITE_UI_DESIGN, svelte-check + cargo check green). Plus test:verify (17 tests) proving the verify gate enforces, now in qa. Matrix complete: {default,brutalist}x{react-v18,svelte-v5}, all verify-green.

title: Preserve adapter value types (avoid unknown widening) (Codex #6)
description: RequiredComponentAdapter widens every adapter value to unknown, forcing downstream casts (App.svelte) and not proving values are renderable components. Introduce framework-specific adapter value types or a generic that preserves concrete component types while still checking required keys+props. React side can keep satisfies; Svelte is limited by declaration-emit. Codex #6.

title: Svelte (v5) component library implementing the contract
description: Implement the shared component contract in Svelte v5 so it is swappable with the React library.
close_reason: Svelte v5 contract parity: added Badge + Toggle (satisfy BadgeContract/ToggleContract), svelteV5ContractAdapter + conformance types mirroring React. 31 tests, svelte-check clean, full pnpm qa green; enforcement verified empirically (contract violation fails typecheck). Annotation (not satisfies) due to Svelte declaration-emit limit, documented.

title: Storybook: browse components with interactive knobs across libraries
description: View component structure and play with controls/knobs for React and Svelte implementations.

title: Scaffold Tauri app (Rust backend) as integration harness
description: Tauri shell with Rust backend used to consume the component libraries via the adapter.
close_reason: Scaffolded apps/tauri-harness (Tauri v2 + React 18 + Vite) consuming the design system via the contract adapter (reactV18ContractAdapter), tokens CSS, rendering Badge/Button/Toggle. Verified: typecheck (imports types from built dist), vite build, cargo check all green; full pnpm qa green. SURFACED + FIXED a real packaging bug: react-v18 build emitted no dist/*.d.ts (vite emptyOutDir wiped tsc output) — now fixed, so the package imports cleanly with types.

title: Wire adapter into Tauri app + demonstrate library swap
description: Import the adapter into the Tauri app, render components, and swap React <-> Svelte via a single import change. This is the headline end-to-end demo.
close_reason: Demonstrated within-lane design swap: added 2nd React-18 design (brutalist), harness swaps default<->brutalist via VITE_UI_DESIGN (one specifier, type-safe, visible). Plus clean ./styles.css packaging on all designs. Integration validated+enforced+packaged. Svelte harness tracked separately (rcl-q64.12).

title: Compile-time contract completeness enforcement
description: Swapping in a library that does not fully implement the contract must fail type-check (type-safe fail-fast).
close_reason: Added reusable required-adapter and required-props assertion types to @design-system/contracts, wired React v18 adapter to those helpers, added runtime key coverage test, and made React scripts build contracts before local checks. pnpm qa passes.

title: Decoupled theming: light/dark + arbitrary themes, easy color/component swap
description: Design decoupled from app via tokens; switch themes and swap colors/components easily, beyond just light/dark.
close_reason: Runtime light/dark theme toggle in the Svelte Tauri harness: flips data-theme on the root, every var(--ds-color-*) re-resolves (page + all components), no rebuild. Powered entirely by the design-tokens dark palette (incl. status tokens). Persists to localStorage. Verified light+dark render; full pnpm qa green.

title: rem-based sizing convention across tokens and components
description: Adopt rem units for sizing throughout the design tokens and components.

title: Author 'vanilla CSS expert' skill for the design system
description: A skill capturing vanilla-CSS strategies (cascade layers, custom properties, theming, rem sizing) to build into this design system.
close_reason: Authored .claude/skills/vanilla-css/ (SKILL.md + 5 references + 3 examples); rem-at-root/mobile-first/layer-separation/token-theming encoded; component examples independently verified PASS the design-system:verify token-discipline gate.

comments.author: claude
comments.text: Scope refined (2026-06-17): vanilla-CSS skill at .claude/skills/vanilla-css. Must encode owner's opinions: rem-at-root (62.5% => 1rem=10px) with a11y caveat (use % not px so user font-size prefs win); mobile-first responsive (min-width, clamp, container queries); clean UI/behavior layer separation via @layer; swappable themes + components; token-driven (no Tailwind, no hardcoded colors) and must pass scripts/verify-design-system.mjs token-discipline gate. Ties to rcl-q64.8 (rem convention). SKILL.md + references/ + examples/.

title: Align component-standard docs with contracts
description: Update docs/component-standard.md so @design-system/contracts is the canonical API source. Remove or clearly separate stale implementation-progress notes, reconcile Button/Badge/Toggle APIs, and document required/planned/experimental contract status from the manifest.
close_reason: Rewrote docs/component-standard.md to make @design-system/contracts canonical, document required/planned contract status, current required Badge/Button/Toggle APIs, implementation extras, adapter compliance, and the no higher-level adapter decision. pnpm qa passes.

title: Design system: packaging, publishing & QA completion
description: Remaining work from PROJECT-PLAN_20250926_design-system.md (Milestones 5 & 6). M1-M4 are complete.

title: Build outputs: pnpm build excludes Storybook assets
description: DS M5: ensure published package excludes Storybook assets.
close_reason: Excluded Storybook stories from published output: svelte-v5 build strips dist/**/*.stories.* (rimraf --glob); react-v18 files narrowed to explicit paths (+ .npmignore defense). Verified via npm pack --dry-run: 0 stories in both, real component/CSS files intact. Full pnpm qa green.

title: npm packaging & distribution design (what publishes, versioning, provenance)
description: Design the publish strategy: which packages are public (contracts, design-tokens, the design cells?) vs private (apps/harnesses, dashboard); npm scope/naming; semver + CHANGELOG; provenance/SHA-pinned publish in CI; how a consumer installs a design + tokens + contracts. Complements rcl-tws.2 (publishing workflow + release ADR).

title: Make design-system:verify read-only / no-emit (Codex #2)
description: The gate runs 'pnpm -r typecheck' which builds contracts + writes composite tsbuildinfo (EPERM under read-only review). Separate conformance verification from build output: no-emit conformance projects with incremental:false / temp tsBuildInfoFile, keep build in pnpm build. Codex review finding #2.

title: Matrix-aware Storybook coverage (Svelte + brutalist) in qa (Codex #8)
description: pnpm qa storybook:test only covers @design-system/default-react-v18. Svelte cells have storybook dev/build but no test script; brutalist cells have no stories. Add matrix-aware storybook build/test or document the coverage boundary. Codex #8.

title: Publishing workflow + release-policy ADR
description: DS M5: npm scripts, versioning strategy, CHANGELOG template; ADR for release policy.

title: Optional component-source export script (shadcn-style)
description: DS M5: emit component source for copy-in consumers.

title: pnpm design-system:verify pre-release check
description: DS M5: verify required components and tokens exist before release.
close_reason: Built pnpm design-system:verify: enforces token discipline (no hardcoded colors → var(--ds-color-*)), tokens-present, contract conformance (typecheck), adapter-export presence. Added semantic status tokens (danger/success/warning, light+dark), tokenized all design CSS to green, exempted decorative confetti (documented). Gate PASSES A/B/C/D; full qa green.

title: QA checkpoint runner (lint + typecheck + tests + Storybook tests)

title: Zero-dependency audit + enforcement for contracts & design-tokens
description: @design-system/contracts and @design-system/design-tokens must have ZERO runtime dependencies (user requirement). Audit current deps, ensure runtime deps are empty (devDeps fine), and ADD a check to scripts/verify-design-system.mjs (or a test) that fails if either package gains a runtime dependency. Foundation for clean npm distribution.
